metadata.title:
RUN LINE


TO THE
BIG BEND

pages.raw_text:
From well authenticated sources
it is learned today that the Inland
Empire system will proceed in 1910
with the construction program for
the line to the Big Bend mapped
out over year ago.


Not much has been said about
this line in the past year, and the
report that Jay p. Graves had sold
out to Jim Hill! gave rise to the be-
lief that no more extensions of the
Graves system would be made.


Real estate men report that
many of the Graves options on
right of way for the Big Bend line
that were about to expire have re-
Gently been closed up for the cash,
which is taken to mean that the
Big Bend line is to be built.


The Big Bend line will run from
Spokane to the junction of the Spo-
kane and the Columbia rivers, a
distance of over 20 miles. 1t will
be built on the plan of steam road
construction, the same as the 9th
er Graves interurban lines.
